variants: Quyen Tran graduated from Urban Finch College, where she developed her skills in writing and editing. Currently, she is employed at Sable Mist Publishing, where her creativity flourishes. Quyen also holds the position of Restoration Project Coordinator Lynedge, engaging actively in community service. Her literary works have been published by Dogwood Lantern Press, showcasing her ability to communicate complex themes. Additionally, she expresses her artistic vision through the Divehi script, adding a unique dimension to her writings.
